texto: The most beautiful place in the world, is anyplace. Anyplace you can hold your head up. Anyplace you can be proud of who you are. But I though, where you love somebody a whole lot, and you know that person loves you, that's the most beautiful place in the world.
explicacao: Citação de Ann Cameron sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The most beautiful place in the world, is anyplace. Anyplace you can hold your head up. Anyplace …” articula amor, beautiful, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.
